chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. 803 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of M.A No.8202/2023. 09.08.2023 Mr. Waseem Akhtar, Advocate for the Appellant. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. -x-x-x-x-x- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that it is an appeal against acquittal and being an appeal, cannot be dismissed in default, therefore, it may be restored to its original position as it was on 13.07.2023. Learned Deputy P.G, Sindh after going through the file, records her no objection. Accordingly, listed application [M.A No.8202 of 2023] is hereby allowed. Consequently, impugned order dated 13.07.2023 is set-aside. Appeal in hand is hereby restored to its original position as it was on 13.07.2023. Let notice be issued to the respondents, for 19.09.2023. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
